description: Existing NestJS app, user minta split UserController yang sudah 720 LOC ke smaller controllers per concern (profile, settings, sessions, notifications) tanpa break public API.
user_message: Refactor src/users/users.controller.ts (currently 720 LOC) by splitting it into focused controllers: profile.controller.ts, settings.controller.ts, sessions.controller.ts, notifications.controller.ts. The public REST routes must stay identical. Keep the existing service layer untouched. Update the module wiring and run the integration tests.
notes: Refactor mode trigger. Public API preservation is architecture concern. Should NOT trigger security or microservices.
